title: stachys iltisii
intro: Stachys iltisii, also known as Betonique, is a type of herbaceous perennial plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae), native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Stachys iltisii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine. Stachys iltisii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
